# Todd Spencer — New Braunfels Real Estate

Todd Spencer is a New Braunfels, Texas real estate agent and local guide serving buyers, sellers, relocating families, retirees, and commuters across New Braunfels, Canyon Lake, River Chase, Vintage Oaks, Veramendi, and Comal County.

## Contact
- Website: https://todd-spencer.com/
- Phone: (512) 665-3747
- Email: todd@todd-spencer.com
- Brokerage: LPT Realty, LLC
- Licensed in Texas

## About
Todd Spencer is a local insider who combines deep knowledge of New Braunfels neighborhoods, the Hill Country lifestyle, and the Texas real estate market. He specializes in helping buyers find the right neighborhood for their lifestyle — whether that's river access, acreage, master-planned communities, or walkable historic areas.

## Service Areas
- New Braunfels, TX (primary city, Comal County)
- Gruene Historic District (part of New Braunfels)
- River Chase (Todd's home neighborhood — hyperlocal expertise)
- Canyon Lake, TX (Comal County — hyperlocal area)
- Vintage Oaks
- Veramendi
- Comal County, TX (primary county)
